title: Toni Helminen
text: Home * People * Toni Helminen Toni Helminen , (JohnWoe) a Finnish IT freelancer, and computer games and computer chess programmer. He is author of multiple open source chess and chess variant engines [1] , the Shogi engine RubyShogi , the chess variant engine Shuriken , the Gothic Chess engine Havoc , and the chess playing engines Sapeli and Mayhem , the latter featuring NNUE [2] .
